changes.text: Skip Activity Box: A new widget in the bottom bar displays recent skip activity, showing who skipped what and when. Now you can see all the latest skips happening in real-time!
Skip Activity box now stores skip history in the database so it persists when users rejoin
Added configurable environment variables for skip activity: SKIP_ACTIVITY_STORED_LIMIT and SKIP_ACTIVITY_SEND_LIMIT
Skip Activity box is now wider and displays more clearly in the bottom bar
Skip events now track whether they were song skips or shield-blocked attempts
Added a Clear Queue History feature to clear your queue history
Fixed a bug where the leaderboard discount wasn't applying correctly
Fixed the issue with the queue metadata not updating and pulling old songs with the wrong name and wrong skip shield count
When queueing a song, it might queue Poo Bum Poo Bum 4. We are working on a fix for this.
